title: Carmen C81237BLK Hair Dryer with Concentrator Nozzle, Three Heat Settings, 2 Speed Settings, 2200W, Black and Grey
features: POWERFUL 2200W OUTPUT: Powerful airflow dries hair quickly, leaving you with a professional, bouncing blow dry without salon prices
LONG-LASTING STYLE: Cool shot setting secures your style in place for a long-lasting blow dry
THREE HEAT AND 2 SPEED SETTINGS: Variable heat and speed settings capable of drying hair of all types with a smooth, glossy finish
PROFESSIONAL FINISH: Concentrator nozzle included for styling sectioned hair to create defined volume and texture
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Professional Carmen quality with a standard 1 year guarantee, with an additional 2 years added once you register the product online
description: Product Description Achieve salon-style blow-dry results at home with this Carmen Hair Dryer. Its powerful 2200W motor provides fast, frizz-free styling with a choice of 3 heat and 2 speed settings to tailor the drying intensity to suit your hair type. Set the look in place with the cool shot function, using a burst of cool air after drying to give your hair style a longer-lasting hold. The concentrator nozzle accessory is for creating the precise look you’re after, helping lift your hair’s natural volume and build definition by directing airflow to where you want it to go. An extra-long 1.8m power cable lets you style without restriction, while the removable filter makes the dryer easy to clean and maintain its top performance. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children, do not rinse or submerge in water, keep the power plug and cord away from heated surfaces, don’t use a hair dryer while bathing.
